text: Comparable #1 has been adjusted for its quality, GLA, basement finished room count, and fence. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its basement finished room count. Comparable #3 has been adjusted for its site size, basement finished room count, and fence. See Comparable #4. The subject property has not sold in the past 36 months. All previous sales of the comparable properties have been reported. All sales appear to reflect arms length transactions for the period which the sale occurred.
